title: Travel and holidays
explanation:
Travel and holidays

  • accommodation: hostel, resort, campsite, guesthouse
  • travel words: delay, departure, luggage, boarding pass, platform
  • holiday verbs: explore, book, check in, set off

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: We stayed in a small ____. It was cheap but clean. | *guesthouse | platform | suitcase
questions.feedback: A guesthouse is a type of accommodation.

questions.text: The flight was cancelled because of a long ____. | *delay | check-in | resort
questions.feedback: Delay means waiting longer than planned.

questions.text: Please show your ____ before you enter the plane. | *boarding pass | platform | resort
questions.feedback: You need a boarding pass at the gate.

questions.text: They want to ____ the old town on foot. | *explore | queue | delay

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option. Use each option ONLY ONCE.

questions.text: We need to ____ in online before the flight. | check
Do not leave your ____ unattended. | luggage
They are staying at a beach ____ this summer. | resort
We decided to ____ a car to see the island. | hire

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The backpackers slept in a youth ____. | *hostel | receipt | forecast
questions.feedback: A hostel is cheap shared accommodation.

questions.text: We ____ at dawn to avoid the traffic. | *set off | took off | gave up
questions.feedback: Set off means start a journey.

questions.text: I booked an ____ to visit the caves. | *excursion | arrival | signal
questions.feedback: An excursion is a short organised trip.

questions.text: Our ____ time is 18:40. | *departure | arrival gate | boarding
